rationale: TokenKey-local registry of upstream Wei-Shaw/sub2api issues that this fork has already addressed. Use this when triaging upstream open issues so already-fixed upstream reports are not repeatedly selected for TokenKey work.

issues.summary: Stopped emitting or forwarding x-stainless-helper-method on Claude Code OAuth mimicry paths.
Preserved captured real Claude CLI User-Agent and X-Stainless fingerprint values when applying mimicry defaults, avoiding version downgrade churn.
